title: This 26 y/o 10x'd Revenue Doing the Opposite of Every AI Startup | Paraform, John Kim
summary: John Kim's Paraform has paid out $50 million to human recruiters while other hiring platforms automate. The company argues that AI has made hiring noisier rather than faster, with engineering hire cold email volumes rising from 500 to 5,000 over five years. Paraform achieved 10x revenue growth in 2025 by positioning human recruiters as the core moat rather than replacing them.
